referralStepsTitle: Share with Friends and Get Rewards
referralStepShareFriends: Share it with your friends via chat, email, or social media.
referralFaqExclusionsAnswer: Referral rewards may not apply when a purchase uses excluded payment methods, stacks with certain third-party offers, or is marked ineligible by the merchant. Standard cashback exclusions on the brand offer page still apply.
referralFaqRefundsAnswer: If a referred friend's qualifying purchase is refunded or reversed, related referral rewards may be adjusted or removed according to the program rules.
referralFaqTrackingAnswer: Invites are attributed when friends sign up and shop using your referral link. It may take a short time after purchase for activity to appear here.
referralFaqOtherTermsAnswer: Reward amounts, eligibility, and rules may change over time. Continued use of the referral program means you accept the current terms. See our help center or terms of service for full details.
withdrawMethodsEmptyDescription: Choose how you'd like to get paid. Add your preferred payout method below.
withdrawMethodLoadError: We could not load this withdrawal method. Please go back and try again.
withdrawMethodComingSoon: This payout method is not available yet. Please use Bank Account to add a withdrawal method.
withdrawMethodPrivacyDisclaimer: Bank account information is used strictly for fund transfer, refund, and identity verification purposes according to GoGoCash privacy policy and PDPA standards. Please double-check accuracy before proceeding. All bank account data is securely managed and will not be shared externally without your consent.

Explore travel deals and earn cashback: Explore travel deals and earn cashback!
Purchases made with Vouchers or Promo co: Purchases made with Vouchers or Promo codes not featured on our platform
Taxes · Service charges · Shipping and d: Taxes · Service charges · Shipping and delivery
Any rejected, cancelled, refunded, excha: Any rejected, cancelled, refunded, exchanged or returned purchases will not be eligible for Cashback.
For partial returns or exchanges, we'll: For partial returns or exchanges, we'll prorate the Cashback as an adjustment.
Your Cashback may be tracked at a differ: Your Cashback may be tracked at a different rate initially and adjusted to the correct rate when we confirm the transaction details.
Please favorite us to stay updated on gr: Please favorite us to stay updated on great deals.
Check carefully for Cashback exclusions: Check carefully for Cashback exclusions and caps before you buy or book to avoid disappointment. Don't forget the terms and conditions on any promotion and campaign pages
Restart from this platform every time: Restart from this platform every time
Complete your shopping in one go Always: Complete your shopping in one go: Always start from this platform to visit the store directly, for every new transaction. If your store visit is interrupted by an app update or download screen, restart your shopping from our platform.
Don't use adblockers or click on other l: Don't use adblockers or click on other links
For Expedia, you need to clear your cart: For Expedia, you need to clear your cart, close the Expedia app, open this platform to visit the Expedia app or website and complete your purchase there in order to earn Cashback. You need to do this for each purchase.
Restart from this platform if payment fa: Restart from this platform if payment fails
If you encounter payment errors during y: If you encounter payment errors during your purchase, you should restart your visit to the Expedia from this platform to ensure that your Cashback continues to be tracked.
Accept all cookies from the store: Accept all cookies from the store
Expedia can only confirm to us that a tr: Expedia can only confirm to us that a transaction is recorded if you accept all cookies that appear on their pages.
Don't click on any third party links or: Don't click on any third party links or extensions or use VPN or adblocking software, as they could result in your Cashback not being tracked. Some examples include: Facebook ads, Google Ads, other loyalty or cashback extension links.
profilePrivacyDisclaimer: Your personal information is encrypted and securely stored. We never share your sensitive data with third parties without your explicit consent.

authPhoneDevOtpInvalid: Invalid code. In development use 123456 for 123456789 or 321654 for 321654987.
authPhoneOtpErrorAria: The verification code is incorrect. Update the digits or use Resend to request a new code.
authPhoneOtpScreenIntro: A verification code will be sent to your mobile number to confirm this action is being performed by you.
authPhoneOtpSentToLabel: Code is sent to phone number :

linkMyCashbackSubtitle: Manage your activities in one centralized account
linkMyCashbackCardDescription: For MyCashBack users, you may link all of the accounts to your GoGoCash profile here to manage your balances and activities from one centralized location.
linkMyCashbackLinkPlaceholder: Account linking will be available soon.
linkMyCashbackMethodDescription: Please select 'Email' or 'Phone Number' as registered with MyCashBack to ensure your account is linked correctly.
linkMyCashbackMethodConsentPrefix: I consent to share my MyCashBack information.
linkMyCashbackVerifyDescriptionEmail: A verification code will be sent to your email address to confirm this action is being performed by you.
pdpaConsentBannerBody: We use data to run cashback, analytics, and (with consent) marketing. You can change preferences anytime.
pdpaPrivacyCenterIntro: Control how we use your data below, download a copy, or exercise your PDPA rights. Turn on optional uses in one tap, or adjust each item anytime.
pdpaConsentHeroBody: Optional consents let us personalize offers, measure what works, share aggregated insights with partners, and run eligibility checks—so cashback and rewards work smoothly for you.
pdpaAcceptAllOptionalHint: One tap enables marketing, analytics, B2B aggregated insights, and AI credit scoring where applicable. You can turn any item off below.
pdpaAllOptionalEnabled: All optional consents are already on.
pdpaConsentSaveError: Could not save your choice. Please try again.
pdpaCashbackRequiredDescription: We track eligible purchases and cashback while your account is active so we can credit rewards and meet merchant agreements. This is not optional while you use the service.
pdpaPurposeMarketingDesc: Email, SMS, LINE, or push about offers and updates you may like.
pdpaPurposeAnalyticsDesc: Helps us fix bugs, improve flows, and understand feature usage in aggregate.
pdpaPurposeB2bDesc: Anonymous or aggregated trends shared with merchants and partners to improve programs.
pdpaPurposeAiDesc: Automated checks for offers or limits where you choose products that use scoring.
pdpaMicroNotice: We collect this information for the stated purpose under PDPA. See Privacy Policy for details.
pdpaGuardianBody: Because you are under 20, we need a parent or guardian to confirm before you can use the full service.
